entries.reason: Pulled transitively through @react-native-community/cli-config-android and @react-native-community/cli-platform-apple 17.0.1 in the Expo SDK 54 / React Native 0.81 chain; those parents currently declare fast-xml-parser ^4.4.1 while the advisories are fixed only in 5.3.5/5.3.6.
entries.cleanupCriteria: Remove once the Expo/React Native CLI dependency chain resolves fast-xml-parser >= 5.3.6 without a compatibility override, then delete this allowlist entry.

entries.reason: Remaining vulnerable paths are transitive minimatch 9.x/3.x in Expo SDK 54 and eslint/@typescript-eslint toolchain dependencies that require major parent upgrades.
entries.cleanupCriteria: Remove after upgrading Expo and lint stack parents so lockfile no longer resolves minimatch < 10.2.1.
